template_data.lead_html: Eighteen months with WOSB. Zero federal revenue.

rows.what_html: WOSB active, no vehicle — buyers couldn't easily pay her
GSA Schedule applied & approved — the foundation that was missing
First federal award lands — WOSB listed in the award summary

template_data.image_headline: YOUR CERT WAS NEVER THE PROBLEM.
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Left side: illustrated timeline with 3 milestone nodes. First node labeled 'CERTIFIED' with red X icon. Second node labeled 'SCHEDULE ADDED' with green checkmark. Third node labeled 'FIRST AWARD' with gold star. Right side: illustrated professional woman in business attire, confident posture, holding a contract folder. Bold headline top: 'YOUR CERT WAS NEVER THE PROBLEM.' Highlighted callout box: '18 MONTHS. ZERO AWARDS.' Dark navy accent band at bottom. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
